name: code-search-assistant
description: Discover and comparatively rank publicly available scientific code repositories for a research or technical task across NASA SMD domains (Astrophysics, Earth Science, Heliophysics, Planetary Science, Biological & Physical Sciences). Read-only and human-in-the-loop: returns up to 6 grounded candidates with reliability signals, or abstains when nothing fits.

code_search_mcp_key.title: Code Search MCP token
code_search_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the Code_Search_MCP_Server (sde-repo-search), which provides repository_search_tool and sde_search_tool. This server requires a token, so it is needed for the primary discovery tools to work.

code_signals_mcp_key.title: Code Signals MCP token
code_signals_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the Code_Signal server, which provides code_signals_search_tool (static code inspection). Needed for that tool; the rest of the pipeline works without it.

ads_ascl_mcp_key.title: ADS / ASCL MCP token
ads_ascl_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the ads-ascl server, which provides ascl_search_tool, ads_search_tool, and ads_links_resolver_tool (the Astrophysics citation channel). Needed for Astrophysics citation ranking; non-Astrophysics queries work without it.
